reviews.review_description:
I didn't know what to expect from this game, but when I tried it I was really impressed! It's like Synth Riders, but whereas that game makes you vibe, this game really focuses on making you actually dance!
It's harder than I expected, but once you get in the zone it really clicks! I'm an underground Hip-Hop head but I still love all of the tracks on here in different ways! Makamba is my...jam...ba(?) At the moment! Haha.
This gives you a good cardio workout too! There's a bunch of songs and styles. It always manages to keep things fresh! This game has really helped lift my depression as well and gets you moving!
Give it a try, even if you're not a dancing person. Who knows, this might make you one...
Plus, no one is watching...except maybe the postman through the window or your family coming home while you were busy busting moves...? But yeah, give this a try! And devs, keep developing!

This game keeps me moving and it's just so much fun! I've tried other games like it and they just don't compare to this one. I love the music too. Wish there were more known tracks and maybe more hip hop and rock/metal and reggae would be nice too. Hopefully the developers keep new trip packs coming. I'm all in.

This is one of the BEST rhythm & exercise games I have ever had!! Please!!!!! Add a song pack for artist like, Michael Jackson, Robin Thicke & Amy Winehouse. I know that they would be EPIC additions! I love the challenges and having Goldie accessible at all times should I not be able to figure out the movements! I would play this games for hours everyday if I had more time

I simply LOVE this app!!! You developers are genius and rock stars. Thank you for creating an app that really makes me dig deeper!! 👍💕

This game is great, makes me feel like I’m in stage. I like above & beyond, you can’t go wrong with proper trance (even if it IS slightly cheesy) and I really like “I’ve been thinking”, makes me feel like I’m in  Mexican gang 
More music please

This game is a blast and it makes you addicted to exercise. The visuals are amazing. It feels like you are on a ride. I highly recommend it to anyone, especially people trying to get in shape and for hyperactive kids. This game gives you better exercise than other games I've played. It also has cooler visuals than other games I've played. I especially love and recommend  cardio mode. Fantastic Game! 😀😀😀

developer_response.body:
Hey JackBauer1611, thanks the recommendation and happy to hear that you've been having fun!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: Love it
Free on indie catalogue at the moment. I love this, the songs are amazing and make you dance with ease! Beginner is hard enough! Cheers devs

Really fun dancing game.  Has more lower body movement than most of the rhythm games so it's a good cardio workout.  I recommend it to anyone who likes to dance or is looking for a fun way to exercise.  :)

developer_response.body:
Hey BryceandDanika, we know that Cardio is a fan favourite (because many of you have mentioned it to us) and we will continue putting out more music with Cardio levels included! Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review~!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: The graphics, fail mechanic feedback, and music are just not as good as the direct competition.  Other music games just have more polished feel.

By far the best fitness app I own! The way they did the mapping it’s so clever like actual dance moves that I’m mastering each time! When I’m in Audio Trip world it takes me to my happy place and I feel so good working out especially on cardio mode! And OMG the new add on packs are amazing 😁 I’m loving Above And Beyond the moves and the beat to ALL of the songs are fire 🔥 I also just read the games description again and there is so much I actually didn’t know was on there so now I’m going to go check it out! 5 stars all the way and keep the beats coming 🥰

A good variety of movements for an intense workout. I found this one more intense than Synth Riders or Beat Saber. It’s apparently choreographed by real dancers and it feels that way! Movements are very well coordinated with the music and you can feel both fluid and dynamic with the mix of gliding circles, riding rails, and smashing drumheads. 

As someone with a disability, I mostly stick with the beginner difficulty and it’s just the right amount of challenge to not be completely unattainable to do but still fun and inclusive! 

Graphics are beautiful too! It’s cool dancing with Goldie. Love this game!

developer_response.body:
Hey rebeckers, you're absolutely right that it is choreographed by a dancer and it's awesome that you could pick that up through playing! If you want to attempt the higher difficulties but don't want to deal with the barriers to make the higher difficulties more manageable, you can modify that in the Options menu. Have fun!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_title: Hands and height do not adjust properly
reviews.review_description: When I first installed the game and began playing, I chose regular difficulty campaign mode and successfully completed the first three levels with over 90% success. Starting on the fourth song it suddenly was not syncing my hands and height properly anymore, placing the note blocks so far apart it wasn't possible to get to them properly and lowering the entiring playing field so far that the lower blocks were all the way down by my feet and impossible to reach. Thinking it was just a difficulty change, I returned to the first three songs I did so well on and they were just as messed up as the fourth song was. I have tried recalibrating, resetting the view, complete shutdown and restart, and complete uninstall and reinstall, and nothing is fixing the problem. I have tried other rhythm games I own such as Beat Saber, and everything is working properly, so it is definitely an Audio Trip issue, not a hardware or user issue.

developer_response.body:
Hey FantasyWarrior39, we'd like to figure this out with you. Please email support@audiotripvr.com or hop into our community Discord server via this link http://audio.chat as we will need to request for some additional files and info from you. 

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: Love this game, it just needs more known songs to make me play more
Didn't expect this to be as good as beat sabre but it's as good in a different way. There are some great songs and you get an amazing workout.

This game makes you want to move and sweat. I agree with others that we need new cardio songs and definitely more of the high bpm songs. There are only a couple that are super challenging but they are my fav. Can’t recommend this game enough!

developer_response.body:
Hey ExplosiveBounty, thank you for the recommendation! Don't worry, more Cardio levels will come in future DLCs.

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description:
The mapping in this game is so good that is nearly feels as dancing. Playing this game improves my mood. 
It also a phenomenal workout.

Dear developers: Thank you for your great work! I wish you can add a  mixed reality mode in the future that would be so cool!

developer_response.body:
Hey Kror_de, it's great to hear that dancing puts you in a good mood! Thank you for the suggestion for mixed reality, we're taking notes.

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description:
Edit: I'm Back! VR fitness wasn't an option for a few years there. My hips are shot. Well, I just got one of em replaced and I'm standing well enough to give it another go(and hoping to have the other hip replaced in a couple months)I'd forgotten how fun this is. It's been an amazing tool for assisting me with my physical rehab. I'm raising my review to an unprecedented 6 Stars.



Initially, I bought this game on Steam, on a bit of a whim. I had an inkling from Beat Saber that a vr rhythm game could potentially lead to some actual choreography. And here I was, a middle aged guy who always wished he could dance. The choreography on this is outstanding. So much so, that I REPURCHASED the game a 2nd time from the Oculus store so I could play it wirelessly on my Quest². That's a new one for me....well, except for Skyrim, but who HASN'T purchased Skyrim more than once? Anyway, everyone loves Synth Riders, and I actually returned it. Maybe if I'd tried Synth Riders before Audio Trip, I would have enjoyed it more, but it's just not as good as this. Also, there's an amazing community pumping out user mapped songs that are awesome. Check the Discord.

developer_response.body:
Hey GammaSmasher, welcome back and thank you for the 6-stars! Nothing beats knowing that our little labour of love was able to help someone on their journey to recovery. We wish you a speedy recovery and plenty of good times with Audio Trip.

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: I've been meaning to write a review for pretty much forever. This is by far my favorite dancing game. Once I learned I needed to actually get behind the notes, my accuracy skyrocketed. I hate working out, but I love passive exercise, especially when a point system is involved, so I play this game pretty much daily. I like that you can make a playlist, but I wish you got to see your score after every song. My goal is always to beat my previous high score. But, you know, that's my ONLY complaint. I didn't like some of the songs on the easier levels, but once I got good enough, I found that the dances on expert level for those were more fun than my previous favorites. I've bought all the expansions, can't wait for more, and I love all the updates to graphics. I like this game so much that I'm writing a review. That's not usually a thing I do. ;)

developer_response.body:
Hey Furious_Mussel, it's always so nice to hear how Audio Trip has played a part in people's fitness journey in a positive way and helping you get an unintentional 6-pack abs? What a flex! Thank you for taking the time to write to us. We're working on more things behind the scenes and hope to bring you more songs to dance to soon!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: I love it

I’ve tried every app, this is by far the most enjoyable workout I’ve had in VR. As a long time rhythm game enthusiast, Audio Trip captures the movement of dance choreography in a more satisfying way than anything I’ve experienced. The mapping is simply fantastic, as are the gameplay mechanisms. Foot tracking is the only thing that could make it even better; of course contingent on newer VR tracking modalities.

I play multiple times a day and this has become my preferred form of cardio. I hope this game becomes as popular as it deserves, and please let me give you more money.

developer_response.body:
Hey senesce, happy to hear that you're having fun and it's always awesome when someone appreciates the choreography! We're still working on improving the game behind the scenes with more songs coming on the horizon!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description:
I have been using this game for a long time. About two weeks ago my old score vanished and it's not recording my current score. Everything is blank. I play with my sisters and I can't see there score either. I don't know if I'm doing better or no. What happened?



Yes I have been playing every week before this happen. I tried again last night and it didn't record my score. It doesn't show the leaderboard at all. Doesn't show my scores compared to my sister scores. It just stopped. How can you fix this?  I contacted support and they didn't help me told me to contact the developer

developer_response.body:
Hey Divajoy69, have you been consistently playing before this incident happened If the issue persists, please reach out to support@audiotripvr.com or join our community Discord here so we can help you further: http://audio.chat/

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: I’m really enjoying this game and workout! I hope more music add-ons get released in the future because I’d be ready to buy those. A mix of releases featuring different famous songs/artists (think beat saber variety) would be perfect.

reviews.review_title: Love this! Great cardio and super fun!
reviews.review_description: Love this app, the expansion packs are good, love Above&Beyond, one of my favorite DJ trio. BUT I do wish they released packs more often and had a larger library of tracks. Other than that, I love this game! Super fun way to get my cardio 🫶

reviews.review_title: What a treat this one is .
reviews.review_description: I was going to get it on my psvr2 , but wanted the cable free experience .  This is so polished and and really gets you going . It has a real edginess to it and keeps you on your toes .  I look forward to more music packs  in the future.  ( i was surprised it was slightly dearer on the quest )    Well to all concerned .

developer_response.body:
Hey bestsvr, welcome to Audio Trip! Great to see you out on the VR dance floor and more music packs will come in the future.

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: I bought the game, installed it on Meta Quest 3. But the game doesn't work, doesn't start. There are constant notifications that some Oculus update is needed. Although all other games work. Either write how to fix this or return the money

developer_response.body:
Hi PeterCry, could I trouble you hop into our Discord server so we can assist you further, or email support@audiotripvr.com?

Thank you!

reviews.review_title: My favorite VR game possibly ever
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game. I play it every night as part of my cardio routine. I love playing the 30 minute non-stop Above and Beyond (DLC) mix at the cardio level. It really gets my heart going while listening to amazing music. I've tried just about all the music workout games on Quest and this one is definitely my favorite. Don't pass it up! Thank you Kinemotik for an amazing game!

developer_response.body:
You must have really good stamina now if you're playing the 30-min Above & Beyond mix every night! Thank you for playing!

♥ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description:
This game is one of my favorites. I play it almost every day and LOVE it.  I appreciate how the songs are choreographed because you can really get into the flow, and it feels like you're dancing (while getting your heart rate up--especially on the cardio and more difficult levels).

The add ons help keep the game fresh.....and I LOVE the 30-minute song in the above and beyond expansion pack.

Thanks for making such a great game and for your attention to detail.

developer_response.body:
Hey ElleVr1, thank you so much for taking the time to leave such a kind review.. We're hard at work behind the scenes so stay tuned for more Trips to dance to soon!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description:
Hopefully sink the lighthouse will be available in the near future as a paid dlc song 🎵 😉 👍

Updated: the new add on neon disco is shockingly bad what happened!!!! How can you go from above and beyond to neon disco? Did you want to save money on the paying for decent songs because neon disco songs must of cost next to nothing!!!! Such a let down and the worse thing is that their is no sample of the tracks so we are going in blind when buying the add on. Very poor and so disappointed that I had to deduct a star for terrible taste in music for neon disco.

Updated: Above and beyond DLC is amazing, and so are the trips!!!! Well done for adding an amazing DLC, which just came out of the blue. I was so pleasantly surprised when I loaded up audio trip this morning to see the above and beyond DLC.....now a 5 star app.

Why, oh, why have you not offered any DLC packs? I mean, you have a great app, but the support for it has stopped, and it's such a shame. I understand you can download custom songs on the Discord website, but not everyone knows how to do that. Please, developers, bring some more songs like the other rhythm games have done. I do the cardio about 3 - 4 times a week, and I find the songs a bit boring now, and a couple of the songs are crap (I think about 2 songs are crap). If you have no plans to update the app with new songs or DLC, can you please let us customers know what your intentions are?  Thanks.
The custom songs feature does not work correctly on all headset types. Audiotrip's team responded appropriately to address the issue.

developer_response.body:
Hi Henvincibles, we got your report in our community Discord server. Thank you for reaching out so we can work with you on getting your issue resolved!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: Good game mechanics, but I can't choose from the songs..

developer_response.body:
Hey johnnyb2012, thank you for leaving us a review! Great to hear that you've been enjoying the game mechanics. You can join our Discord community server and tell us what kind of song genres you would like to see in the game by following this link http://audio.chat

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: I love Beat saber/Synthriders etc but I think Audiotrip is the best when it comes to straight up cardio training. It really makes you stretch out and work hard from the getgo. Very clean looking and enjoyable to experience as well!

Absolutely love audio trip. The music is fantastic and the graphics are awesome. BUT in Challenger 
mode I cannot get past Pineapple Hands. I have tried SO MANY times and it's very frustrating. Some of the high  wide ones are out of my reach and I have calibrated my height to be slightly smaller. That didn't help either. Your YouTube video shows how to edit for speed and use No Fail but they aren't there on Challenge option. Or if they are I have failed to find them . All those locked away songs.  Would have given 5 stars but for this. Update: very next evening, I cracked Pineapple Hands.  Victory lap!  Have since worked out to that track again. It's still.difficult  but manageable.

Update: I'm glad to discover that Audio Trip is working again.  It's one of my favorites.  I like that it feels more like dancing.  The moves are challenging.  I just completed the beginner challenge.  It's definitely worth adding.

I really enjoyed Audio Trip when it worked.  However, the game will not load.  It loads up to where I can select campaign or freeplay, but  after selecting, the screen goes black.  I've un-installed and reinstalled, but still doesn't work.

developer_response.body:
Hiya butterflygirl8985, welcome back to the dance floor! Thank you for updating your review. We are glad that the issue was resolved and you can get to dancing again. 

♥ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: See I don't own music, i simply have a Spotify account and while I am sure the game is fun i literally hate the electronic music. It annoys that much that I barely play this game.

developer_response.body:
Hey LaughingGuppy3345, thank you for giving our game a chance even though the music genre isn't up your alley. We are still working on releasing more music though, so hopefully there will be something to your liking in the future!

♥ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_title: Excellent music game and workout app
reviews.review_description:
Audio Trip is similar to many other music and fitness games in which certain objects travel toward the player and they have to touch/hit them to confirm them. There are 4 types of notes - triangular notes one just needs to touch, long notes that need to be followed with a controller, gem notes that are directional and drum notes that need to be hit with a certain velocity. The game also features obstacles that need to be fully avoided by both the head and hands. 

While the mechanics of the game may be similar to other games this game concentrates on the fitness aspect and immersion. All the maps are very well done and they are more of dance choreographies. The game requires a wide range of motion which is rare among these type of games. Audio Trip is more about technical execution (dance) rather than speed. It offers special routines meant for cardio that keep a steady rhythm and make the player move more. When it comes to immersion, all the maps have nicely crafted environments that fit with the song and the map. They are truly works of art. 

The game offers Campaign mode with different kinds of challenges and Free play where one can play full songs, shorter versions, cardio routines, edits of any routine and custom songs. There is no multiplayer which is something many players would appreciate. 

Audio Trip is very meticulously crafted music game that can also double as a fitness app with good music and dance routines. The game focuses on immersion which also means there is less focus on scoring and player's accuracy. There are many quality of life settings and after completing Campaign mode one has access to modifiers that can make the game easier, harder (this affects score) or more fun. 

Highly recommended.

developer_response.body:
Wow thank you for the extensive review stsung! We are really happy to hear that the immersion aspect translated across to you. We definitely wanted our players to have fun and focus more on the dancing aspect rather than the competitive aspect of things (eg. accuracy, etc.) so really appreciate that you noticed that!

♥ Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: Play it all the time. So many variables to explore. Wish there was an easier way to create my own choreography. ☆+☆+
This game really isn't fun and I don't think you can add your own music like the listing says. The are much better rhythm games out there.

developer_response.body:
Hi Bigsnart, sorry to hear that you are having issues installing your own songs into the game. Please join our Discord and open a support ticket by following this link http://audio.chat/ or email us at support@audiotripvr.com so we can assist you further.

Thank you!

♥︎ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: I wish they could make it as a multiayer apps ... like synthriders

developer_response.body:
Hey never2late.2024, multiplayer is in the pipeline!

♥ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: Suddenly, all my progress was deleted. It’s super annoying, especially when you have global high scores and then you cannot even get the same amount of points because the campaign progress is also 0%, which means you cannot select bonuses. Super annoying. ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi CyberHonk, we just pushed a new update yesterday. It should resolve the issue you are having. Could you update the game and let us know if that fixed things for you? Thank you!

- Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description:
Audio Trip: Like, Woah!
Okay, so Audio Trip in VR is like, totally amazing. The sound and the way it looks is a real audio visul treat. Seriously, it's so pretty and the music just kinda grabs you. You don't even realise your getting a good cardio work out cuz your too busy trying to hit all the notes and stuff. Honestly, time flys by! I started playing and then BAM! It was like ages later. If you got a VR headset, you gotta get this. It's just so much fun and you don't even feel like your exercising. Deffo worth it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the glowing review sophoreo.2024! We hope to continue bringing new moves and good vibes ✨

♥ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description:
New to VR (52 Female) and working my way to fitness using the dance/beat games.

This is so good, feels like being at a club in your own home. The music is good, the gist is easy and I really get a  sweat on.

I put a long playlist on and just dance like no one is watching. Feel like I have all the moves now. Never danced so good.
I prefer it over Beat Sabre and just dance!!

reviews.review_title: My progress is deleted after update
reviews.review_description: My progress is deleted after an upgrade, I can't increase speed anymore.

developer_response.body:
Hi mzy81, we just pushed a new update yesterday. It should resolve the issue you are having. Could you update the game and let us know if that fixed things for you? Thank you!

- The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_title: Beat Saber? More like Beaten Saber!
reviews.review_description: So, how about a cross-buy game with a cheaper price tag (and even on sale regularly), that has actual songs in the core pack without DLC overload? How about drag and drop custom song support on both PCVR and standalone? How about a built in, official editor on both versions too? Add in the ability to make customs out of the core pack songs with it as well, because why the heck not! Wait, no mixed reality option?! 1 out of 10...just kidding...GET THIS GAME, IT'S AMAZING! This should be the new standard for rhythm games in the future!

I really love this game and the music that comes with it is better than most Rhythm games and you even get some premium songs. The visuals are insanely good. I'd say the best not counting Synth Rider's Experiences DLCs. Great workout including Cardio Mode, tons of options for tweaking . The issue I have is  that horrible sound when you don't hit a target EXACTLY right. It ruins the mood and fun of moving to the music. It'd be cool if you could control the volume on that or if you want, remove it altogether. I'm having trouble getting the height calibration perfect. It'd be cool if we could type in our height, which would make it easier to tweak it so it's just right.  With these fixes and more DLC packs this would be my favorite rhythm game. Right now in my opinion,  Synth Riders is #1 , Audio Trip #2, Star Waves #3 and Beat Saber is #4.  All good games for sure and I know a lot of people will disagree with me (Beat Saber fans). *Update If you like trippy stuff get the Above and Beyond DLC. It's outstanding.

developer_response.body:
Hey nahli.marie, thanks for leaving us a review! Regarding the sound that plays when you miss a target, you can go into the Options menu > Volume Settings, and you should be able to see 5 volume sliders. Turn the one called "Negative Feedback" down to 0 and you won't hear the sound anymore. Hope that helps!

♥ The Audio Trip team

reviews.review_description: Didn't like it at first, but now it's one of my favorites.
Love this game. Can play continuously with random mode. No need to pause and pick the next song.
My favourite app for cardio exercise!

reviews.review_title: This could be one of the best VR games.
reviews.review_description:
This easily could be one of the best VR games and it is sad that so much potential is wasted over the years. UI is badly designed, there is so many issues with song browser, that I will not even try to list all of them. Even simple thing like memory of place where you last been is missing. Hit-box detection is too strict, making this game very unsatisfying. There is too much clutter and there is no way to change this. There is no feedback and you don't know "note" scores, until you finish song, so you don't really know when you're not accurate enough.

EDIT: The worst part of the weird hit-box is that you actually see hitting notes correctly, but they are just do not register. This is extremely disappointing. Please fix this. I'm changing to one star because of this.
If you would like a referral discount, please DM me.

reviews.review_title: Good game but some improvements needed
reviews.review_description: Overall good choice of music and you do get sweaty and tired playing it. However the sound and visual effect you get when hitting a wrong key or failing to avoid a wall is a big turn off to me. It ruins the whole ‘I’m dancing and it’s fun’ experience seeing the screen turning red, and the sound effect just drags me out of the music immediately. This is a music game, not a survivor game. A slight indication of ‘hey you didn’t hit the right key’ is enough. For example if the the player fails to avoid a wall, maybe the wall can just break without the screen turning red. Or when the player misses a key, the controller can just vibrate in a different way (or not vibrate at all), instead of giving a big failing sound effect and music fading out.

developer_response.body:
Hey there RealMewton, thank you for your review! Just to make sure we covered all our bases here, have you checked the Options menu for a setting Volume Settings? Nested in the Volume settings menu, there is a slider for 'Negative Feedback' that you can turn completely down, and this will eliminate the sound cue that plays in game when you miss. We hope this helps and thank you so much for playing our game!

♥ Kinemotik Studios

reviews.review_description: I like this… a lot! But, where is the new music?

I got It on sale bundled with another game.  Looked OK but didn’t hook my attention.  I tried it out and was SO surprised that it’s actually REALLY REALLY FUN.  It gets you moving and doesn’t feel like a dance game.  Difficulty even on beginner might be a little too challenging for some players but I love it.  Dope game!  Congrats!

I love this game so much, but let's be clear, this is a fitness/cardio app more than a game. I've been playing this as my workout every morning and trust me when I say this one makes you sweat. I've lost 5lbs in 2 weeks.  Best Saber is really fun, but you don't move much. Synth Riders has great tunes, but it's more of a shoulder workout. Audio Trip is intense... all core and cardio. You are constantly squatting, moving side to side, and really reaching far for the targets. I burn about 400-500 calories in a half hour. On normal! I find the movements to be excellent as well. It feels natural and more "dancey" than others. The only thing is I wish it had more songs. The songs they have are excellent, but doing this daily as my workout means the limited songs are getting repetitive. I'd pay for a song pack!

reviews.review_title: This app is more than I expected!
reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing app. Engages your whole body and will leave you in a sweat, just on beginners mode. I'm excited to work my skills up and try the harder levels.

Music is great, the reason I didn't give 5 stars is because I'd love to see more popular music come to the app, but the songs on there are amazing. Lady gaga, skrillex, Tones and I etc

I love that I can connect my watch to the game through Yur, I have a profile made with them now that will track my progress.

I'm really glad I got this, i bought it on special for $20AUD and its definitely worth it. What a bargain.

Excited to play some more. Thanks guys

reviews.review_title: Are you kidding?! This is amazing
reviews.review_description:
Literally blown away. Never boring, good workout, great music. It’s euphoric hitting the streams of colors. I do think it’s more fun (and better exercise) with “No Fail” turned on. Hopefully they will have an option for more music in the future. (add in packs?) 
Love it.

Don’t waste a refund on this one. It’s the same as the million other rhythm games the quest puts out. This is a little better than audio shield but not much. Poor graphics, boring after 5 minutes. I thought the quest would have better games than this.

Recently bought the Quest 2 and wasn’t sure which apps would be good, as always went with reviews and installed most popular titles for Quest. I was sceptic about this game but wanted something in this genre and I must say I completely love the app over any other popular title. It’s fun and comfortable to dance now. I will recommend this as the first app on any oculus quest device.

P.S. - I have never danced in my life, never had the confidence.

I had a lot of fun with this one, bet there is always one but... I like the game, but there are only a few songs you can play. And there is only three which I like, so It's not fun after a few days. They could add more songs to the playlist then I would rate them 5 stars.
My favorite game ❣️ can’t wait to play each day

I may only get 50% accuracy, but my heart rate, fun and sweat glands be at 100%. 10/5 great music, great movement, all around the most fun doing cardio I have ever had! If you hate cardio, this is definitely the go to.

P.S. I personally turn the girl Goldie or what ever off. Distracting, and sometimes doesn't match the task at hand. I just want to feel the burn! 

**Devs** please add 'electric callboy!' pump it and we got the moves would be perfect!
